title: DeepResearch.Se/cure — the client tier's deep-research pipeline (public/js/drc-research.js)

meta.notes: The same research pipeline ported to the browser: the pipeline invariants hold client-side, every wire call goes browser-direct on the user's own key (or to their local server), and the origin server appears ONLY in the optional granted web-search phase — the declared, bounded exception.

phases.title: Project-memory retrieval (client-side RAG over the sealed state)

failure.degradesTo: no recall block; the pipeline runs without project memory

phases.title: Question analysis into a research plan
Parallel knowledge harvest — the search wave's offline counterpart

failure.degradesTo: fewer harvest angles; the answer still streams

phases.title: Granted live web search (the bounded borrowed-capability exception)
Coverage audit driving one follow-up harvest round

failure.degradesTo: current coverage accepted, no follow-up round

phases.title: Streamed answer on the user's chosen model

failure.degradesTo: an error message in the chat — the one phase that may fail the request

phases.title: Draft review with a discard-and-replace revision verdict
